vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years in primary school, I developed a profound fascination with natural sciences.

vocab.meaning: có năng khiếu bẩm sinh về
vocab.example: I seemed to have a natural flair for languages, so English lessons were always the highlight of my week.

vocab.meaning: phương thức giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: Fine Arts served as a vital creative outlet for me, allowing me to express myself beyond textbooks.

vocab.meaning: cuốn hút sự tưởng tượng của ai đó
vocab.example: History lessons really captivated my imagination, especially when we learned about ancient civilizations.

vocab.meaning: người nhiệt tình ủng hộ/yêu thích cái gì
vocab.example: I was a keen advocate for Physical Education because I loved being active and competitive on the field.
Geography was my favorite because it helped expand my horizons regarding how people live in other countries.
Mathematics was a foundational pillar of my early education, providing me with essential problem-solving skills.

vocab.meaning: một trí óc ham học hỏi/hay đặt câu hỏi
vocab.example: Science experiments were perfect for an inquisitive mind like mine, as they always revealed how things worked.

vocab.meaning: say mê, đắm chìm vào cái gì
vocab.example: I would often be deeply engrossed in my literature books, even after the school bell rang.

vocab.meaning: khơi gợi lại niềm yêu thích
vocab.example: A particularly passionate teacher managed to rekindle my interest in music during the third grade.
